FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7fe03a6ac0e0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-05T16:04:48Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-05T16:03:05Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-05T16:04:48Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-05T16:03:05Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/05 16:06:34.434610632 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434618456 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434649885 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434652199 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434670444 {
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434671355 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434683297 new <- list()
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434684099 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434696332 new$width <- width
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434697153 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434710689 new$height <- height
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434711540 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434725366 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434726288 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434739963 new$title <- title
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434740715 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434753789 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434754601 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434769168 new$version <- version
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434769979 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434784286 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434785148 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434798322 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434799274 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434819131 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434819943 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434837476 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434838307 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434859088 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434861572 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434886138 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434887180 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434919721 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434921034 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434987819 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/05 16:06:34.434989622 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435008247 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435009369 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435024936 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435027270 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435046286 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435049091 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435098816 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435100519 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435120266 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435121258 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435135755 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435136216 "default"))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435147306 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435147737 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435157335 }
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435157886 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435167564 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435168005 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435177783 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435178204 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435188011 }
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435189734 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435206706 }
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435207527 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435220381 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435221273 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435235259 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435236241 domain = NA)
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435254505 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435255437 }
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435272408 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435273260 old$family <- family
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435291965 }
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435293157 version <- old$version
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435308986 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435309968 "2.0")
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435326109 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435326990 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435349743 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435350554 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435365122 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435365973 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435379508 domain = NA)
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435380280 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435393324 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435394126 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435411889 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435412640 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435429722 invisible()
2026/05/05 16:06:34.435430514 }
